cancellation logic could be affected but is lower risk."},{"id":111959,"name":"Cancel profiling and previewing queries when processing","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"Profiling/previewing cancellation indirectly related to PR #24651 auto source load changes; worth running if time allows."},{"id":96623,"name":"Create a Full Model - MYOB AccountRight Live (Basic Datasource Testing)","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"MYOB AccountRight connector indirectly affected by PR #24536 page recovery fixes; basic model creation validates connector stability."},{"id":97937,"name":"MYOB - support enumerating, selecting and auto-merging accessible company files","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"MYOB company enumeration could be indirectly affected by PR #24536 page recovery fixes."},{"id":98874,"name":"MYOB- Company selection and access control improvements","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"MYOB company access control indirectly related to PR #24536 MYOB changes; lower risk as page recovery is a distinct code path."},{"id":101475,"name":"Date Pipeline should still work without Hierarchy","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"Date pipeline processing indirectly touches Modeller core paths changed in #24651/#24578 but no direct dependency."},{"id":101999,"name":"Datasource - model's warehouse db as datasource","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"DataSources changes (#24593 default load columns API) could affect how warehouse-as-datasource resolves columns."},{"id":107158,"name":"Enable Source Query checkbox on D365 Finance and SCM solution","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"DataSources area changed; D365 Finance/SCM source query toggle is a distinct path but DataSources cleanup PRs could affect it."},{"id":98666,"name":"Enforce key uniqueness for field existing pipelines","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"Modeller pipeline key uniqueness logic is adjacent to pipeline metadata changes in #24551 link attributes; low direct overlap."},{"id":110317,"name":"Licensing support for database script, advanced pipeline steps, data sources, publication rule, and report pack","tier":"Tier-2","priority":"optional","reasoning":"Cross-cutting SharedSource changes could theoretically affect licensing checks, but no licensing-specific PRs are present."}],"summary":"This release is broad but concentrated in four main risk zones: (1) Analytics and Query — PRs #24701, #24641, #24553, and multiple merge PRs change account functions, slicer request handling, and theme management, making all analytic and filtering test cases high priority; (2) Modeller pipeline processing — PRs #24651 and #24578 alter auto source load and future-record partitioned processing, requiring thorough pipeline, delta, and materialization test coverage; (3) Cross-cutting registrations and type generation — PRs #24523, #24550, #24563, #24572 touch SharedSource, Portal, and Modeller registration wiring globally, so all resource-creation and connection-change Tier-1 tests are mandatory; (4) ERP connectors — PRs #24498 (BC Cloud Codeunit Extension), #24536 (MYOB page recovery), and #24634 (Xero TB virtual column) require targeted connector validation, with BC Cloud and MYOB being the highest priority given functional changes. Copilot and ClientShared UI icon PRs carry low regression risk to core QA scenarios."}

prs.pr_title: Fix client side type generation for IconNames
prs.risk_reasoning: Touches SharedSource/Web.Core client typings AND spans multiple product areas (Portal Banner, QueryDesign, ResourceExplorer, Copilot, Modeller UI, and build tooling) — cross-cutting type generation change with blast radius across all TypeScript consumers.

Modifies SharedSource/Core serialization infrastructure (PatchAttributes, JsonPatchHelpers) and CopilotModelPatcher alongside CellSet serialization models — SharedSource/Core changes carry the highest blast radius, affecting all model patching and resource serialization.

69+ files spanning Portal Controllers, Controls, Presentation/CellSets, Resources/Olap, and many more areas in a registration/cleanup refactor — touching multiple product layers simultaneously creates high risk of dependency injection or runtime registration failures.

88+ file release merge spanning Portal API, Copilot infrastructure, Controllers, Client UI, and SharedSource — large release merge across multiple product areas with cumulative risk from all included changes.

Replaces AI function schema generation in SharedSource/Core (CopilotJsonSchema, CopilotJsonSchemaGenerator, JsonSchemaTransformer, serialization converters) — fundamental change to shared JSON schema and serialization infrastructure used by all Copilot tool definitions.

109+ files in a registration/cleanup refactor across Portal modules, Presentation/CellSets, Resources/Events, Olap connections, and many more — the largest PR in the set, touching virtually every product layer with high DI/runtime regression risk.

Changes span SharedSource/Core, SharedSource/Query, Modeller/AnalysisServices, Modeller/Ssas.Tabular, Modeller/CubeModel, and BI/Portal/Controls — maximum blast radius touching the query framework, SSAS cube generation, and portal rendering simultaneously.

Heavy SharedSource/Core changes covering security (ActiveDirectoryService, ProfileOwnershipHelper, SystemUserContext), licensing, and background task infrastructure, combined with Portal authentication (OwinPaths, MicrosoftAppUserAuthenticator) and Modeller UI — high blast radius across auth, licensing, and job execution.

SharedSource/Core changes to ResourceImportOrPasteHandler, ResourceConverter, ConditionEvaluator, and PermalinksRepository affect import/export, event evaluation, and persistence across the entire product, compounded by Portal module and Modeller Core pipeline changes.

prs.pr_title: Open model background tasks from data limits
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifies both SharedSource/Web.Core (BackgroundTasksController, TaskTimeRange typings) and SharedSource/Core/BackgroundTasks alongside Portal client UI and CellSets — any change to the shared background task infrastructure has broad impact on all async operations across the platform.

Touches SharedSource/Query (cross-cutting query execution framework) and modifies accounting XML content files (Balance Sheet, Trial Balance templates) plus a DomGenerator class — changes to these accounting function definitions affect all financial reporting queries.
prs.changed_files_json: ["BI/Resources/Query/DomGenerators/DimensionalityTemplateFunctionMarkers.cs","SharedSource/Query/SystemContent/Accounting/Balance sheet closing (consolidated).xml","SharedSource/Query/SystemContent/Accounting/Balance sheet closing.xml","SharedSource/Query/SystemContent/Accounting/Balance sheet opening (consolidated).xml","SharedSource/Query/SystemContent/Accounting/Balance sheet opening.xml","SharedSource/Query/SystemContent/Accounting/Trial balance closing.xml","SharedSource/Query/SystemContent/Accounting/Trial balance opening.xml","SharedSource/Query/SystemContent/SearchMetadata.xml"]

prs.pr_title: Allow tools to provide custom icons
prs.risk_reasoning: Adds custom icon capability to Copilot tools touching SharedSource/Web.Core (CopilotToolMetadataProvider, CopilotToolDisplayNameProvider) and multiple Copilot tool implementations across Portal and Modeller — new feature but modifies shared Copilot infrastructure.

49+ files across Modeller/Core pipeline loaders, SerializationModel, and Modeller/UI — changes to auto source load defaults and IConfiguredDataSource/IDataSourceState interfaces affect the core data pipeline and model serialization, with high regression potential for all connector types.

prs.pr_title: Show thinking titles in copilot chat
prs.risk_reasoning: Touches SharedSource/Core/FeatureSwitching/FeatureSwitchGroup.cs (cross-cutting feature flag infrastructure) in addition to Portal Copilot UI files — the FeatureSwitchGroup change could affect feature flag evaluation across the entire platform.

Release merge touching OLAP connection managers (AmoDataManager, CachingAmoDataManager, TomDataManager) and query processing (CurrentPeriodMdxReplacer, DateDimensionKeyFormatProvider) — changes to OLAP connection and MDX query handling carry significant regression risk for all cube-based reports.

prs.pr_title: fix theme manager circular reference detection
prs.risk_reasoning: Theme manager circular reference fix modifies ThemeManager, ThemeComponents, and related interfaces used by Presentation/Charts and Presentation/CellSets — a bug fix to shared theming infrastructure that affects chart and table rendering across all reports.

prs.pr_title: Include future records when partitioned processing
prs.risk_reasoning: Changes to Modeller/Core pipeline loaders (PartitionDateProvider, PartitionedFromDataSourceMaterializer) and Modeller/Warehouse — modifying partitioned data processing logic carries risk of incorrect data loads or missing records in warehouse targets.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113325,"type":"Bug","title":"Future records are excluded from partition first load","state":"Testing"}]

prs.risk_reasoning: Type generation changes touching SharedSource/Web.Core (WebCoreContent, ZapResourceNames) and Portal/Modeller module registrations — SharedSource/Web.Core is a cross-cutting ASP.NET base layer, though the changes appear primarily build-time with module registration side effects.

prs.pr_title: Dynamics Business Central Cloud - Update Docs
prs.risk_reasoning: Primarily documentation updates for Dynamics 365 Business Central Cloud, but includes two code file changes (InjectionSetup.ts in BCCloud.Smart and ModellerSwitch.cs) — scoped to a single ERP connector area.

prs.pr_title: pass requestId to slicer api call.
prs.risk_reasoning: Two targeted files (CellSetApiController and CellSetResultBuilder) threading a requestId through the slicer API call — scoped change to existing analytics data retrieval path with moderate risk to slicer/pivot table functionality.
Auto-merge of a release branch into master for DataSources — no individual file list available, but release merges accumulate multiple connector changes that could affect any data source connector.

prs.pr_title: application-level filtering for xero tb virtual column
prs.risk_reasoning: Application-level filtering for Xero trial balance virtual column targets an existing Xero connector feature — isolated to one ERP connector but modifies existing data filtering behaviour.
Auto-merge of release branch into master for DataSources — accumulated release changes without a file list warrant medium caution.
Auto-merge of release branch into master for DataSources — same rationale as other DataSources release merges; scope unknown without file list.

prs.pr_title: source filter support for ap aging tables
prs.risk_reasoning: Source filter support for AP aging tables modifies existing DataSources filtering logic for a specific table type — isolated to one area but changes existing data retrieval behaviour.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113312,"type":"Bug","title":"Intacct - AP Aging via Custom Report API - Inconsistency result in Source filter","state":"Testing"}]

prs.risk_reasoning: Cleanup of custom table lists in DataSources implies refactoring existing logic — without a file list the scope is uncertain, but connector-level cleanup can affect data ingestion for affected sources.

prs.pr_title: TextArea allows onSubmit to be overridden
prs.risk_reasoning: Modifying existing TextArea component behaviour (onSubmit override) in ClientShared — this shared component is used across Portal, so behavioural changes could affect any form submission in the product.
Full version merge (026 to master) for DataSources without a file list — accumulated changes from a prior release cycle warrant medium caution.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113358,"type":"Bug","title":"Numerous unobserved task exceptions in Data Hub and Data Sources","state":"Testing"},{"id":113367,"type":"Support Issue","title":"DH Pace - Client seeing error messages in the logs.","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: Dynamics Business Central Cloud - Add Codeunit Extension
prs.risk_reasoning: Adding a Codeunit Extension to the BC Cloud connector modifies an existing ERP connector's data extraction logic, which could affect BC cloud data sync for affected customers.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113212,"type":"Task","title":"Dynamics 365 Business Central Cloud - Codeunit Extension Implementation","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: Intacct - Correctly use Date data type
prs.risk_reasoning: Correcting Date data type usage in the Intacct connector is a targeted bug fix to an existing connector that could affect date field extraction and downstream data integrity.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":113352,"type":"Support Issue","title":"4thdimension. Intacct. Encountered the following result error: DL02000001: (Error: There was an error processing the request.","state":"Awaiting support"}]

prs.pr_title: Adding Zap AI MessageInput features to TextArea
prs.risk_reasoning: Adding Zap AI MessageInput features into the existing TextArea component modifies shared UI infrastructure used across the Portal, increasing risk of unintended side effects in any screen using TextArea.
Page recovery fixes in the MYOB connector address existing reliability behaviour in data pagination, which could affect completeness and correctness of MYOB data ingestion.
prs.work_items_json: [{"id":112116,"type":"Change Request","title":"Partitioning support for Access data sources","state":"Closed"}]

prs.pr_title: Basic Zap AI unread message counter
prs.risk_reasoning: Only 2 files changed (CopilotChatButton and CopilotChatModel) — small, additive UI change adding an unread message counter to the Copilot banner button with no shared infrastructure impact.

prs.pr_title: Added icon for Talk data to me
prs.risk_reasoning: Additive icon addition for 'Talk data to me' feature in ClientShared — purely visual asset, no logic change.

prs.pr_title: Snowflake - Add Native SQL API connector
prs.risk_reasoning: New Snowflake Native SQL API connector is an additive new data source — isolated feature with no modification of existing connectors.

prs.pr_title: Add api for default load columns
prs.risk_reasoning: New API for default load columns is additive — adds new endpoint behaviour without stated modification of existing DataSources logic.

prs.pr_title: Add multiTable icon for allAvailableTables context item
prs.risk_reasoning: Adding a multiTable icon for a context menu item is a purely additive visual change in ClientShared.
Adding a new icon to the shared client UI component library is additive-only with no modification of existing behaviour, though it touches a shared package used across the Portal.
Single build.ps1 change to speed up local nuke operations — no runtime impact, purely affects local developer build performance.
Pure documentation update for Snowflake and BigQuery — three Docs markdown files only, no runtime code changes.
Twelve Docs files (markdown and images) updating SQL Scripts documentation — pure documentation with no runtime code changes.
Single .mdx documentation file change covering partitioning reference — no runtime code affected.
Minor visual cutout added to an existing icon in ClientShared — negligible runtime risk.
Single GitInfo.txt version bump to 2026.4 — no runtime code changed.

refined.name: Filter an analytic using the Filters placeholder
refined.reasoning: Tier-1. Analytics PRs (#24553 theme fix, #24628 merge, #24701 account functions) directly affect analytic rendering and filter behaviour.

refined.name: Slice an analytic using slicer types
refined.reasoning: Tier-1. PR #24641 explicitly changes the slicer API call (passes requestId); slicer functionality must be verified end-to-end.

refined.name: Create a basic analysis table
refined.reasoning: Tier-1. Broad cross-cutting registration changes (#24523, #24550, #24563, #24624) affect resource creation paths including analysis tables.

refined.name: Refresh report data on-demand
refined.reasoning: Tier-1. PR #24539 opens model background tasks from data limits, directly touching on-demand refresh and pipeline execution flow.

refined.name: Create a basic dashboard with resources
refined.reasoning: Tier-1. Portal/Presentation registration cleanups (#24563, #24624) affect resource wiring including dashboards.

refined.name: Create a report pack with resources and section breaks
refined.reasoning: Tier-1. Portal/Presentation changes and resource registration updates could affect report pack composition and rendering.

refined.name: Create a basic chart
refined.reasoning: Tier-1. Analytics engine touched by multiple PRs (#24553, #24628, #24655); chart creation exercises core analytic and presentation paths.

refined.reasoning: Tier-1. PR #24701 (account function improvements) and cross-cutting SharedSource changes affect calculated member formula evaluation.

refined.reasoning: Tier-1. Portal/Presentation registration and SharedSource type-generation changes could break import/export serialisation paths.

refined.name: Accounting functions on analytics
refined.reasoning: PR #24701 directly improves account functions on analytics; this test exercises exactly those accounting functions across multiple models.

refined.name: Dynamics 365 BC Cloud with new dynamics extension
refined.reasoning: PR #24498 adds a BC Cloud Codeunit Extension; this test validates the BC Cloud extension download and model processing flow end-to-end.

refined.name: Apply multiple filters to restrict analytic data

refined.reasoning: PR #24551 (Link attributes improvements) is cross-cutting Modeller+Analytics+Shared; Reference Relationships depend on link attribute metadata.

refined.name: Relative Time folder should show for Date hierarchies in dimension tree
refined.reasoning: Analytics dimension tree paths changed in merge PRs (#24628, #24655); relative time folders rely on hierarchy metadata that could be affected.

testRecommendations.refineSummary: This release is broad but concentrated in four main risk zones: (1) Analytics and Query — PRs #24701, #24641, #24553, and multiple merge PRs change account functions, slicer request handling, and theme management, making all analytic and filtering test cases high priority; (2) Modeller pipeline processing — PRs #24651 and #24578 alter auto source load and future-record partitioned processing, requiring thorough pipeline, delta, and materialization test coverage; (3) Cross-cutting registrations and type generation — PRs #24523, #24550, #24563, #24572 touch SharedSource, Portal, and Modeller registration wiring globally, so all resource-creation and connection-change Tier-1 tests are mandatory; (4) ERP connectors — PRs #24498 (BC Cloud Codeunit Extension), #24536 (MYOB page recovery), and #24634 (Xero TB virtual column) require targeted connector validation, with BC Cloud and MYOB being the highest priority given functional changes. Copilot and ClientShared UI icon PRs carry low regression risk to core QA scenarios.
